ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (scale of 0 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text content of the user's review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Short title for the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app, API) */,
  "review_photos" TEXT /* List of URLs or file paths to photos uploaded by the user */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review not helpful */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recipe */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the recipe */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the recipe belongs to */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required to prepare the recipe */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients required for the recipe */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Step-by-step instructions for preparing the recipe */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recipe */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the recipe was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the recipe was last modified */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating of the recipe based on user reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the recipe */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the recipe has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., approve, reject, edit) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the moderation action was performed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
